at.jku.risc.stout.urau.algo

Class AlignmentList

  • java.lang.Object
    • at.jku.risc.stout.urau.util.TinyList<AlignmentList.Alignment>
      • at.jku.risc.stout.urau.algo.AlignmentList
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Poolable

    public class AlignmentList
extends TinyList<AlignmentList.Alignment>
implements Poolable
    A list of AlignmentList.Alignment elements which is pooled. Use the method obtainList() to obtain a list from the Pool.
    Author:
    Alexander Baumgartner

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  AlignmentList.Alignment
      An AlignmentList.Alignment is a list of AlignmentList.Alignment.AlignmentAtoms.

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void cleanUp()
      This method is called from the Pool before the object is returned to the pool.
      void free() 
      static void fullCleanUp()
      Cleans up the entire memory from the current object pool.
      AlignmentList.Alignment get(int i)
      Returns an alignment of this list.
      Poolable newObject()
      This method is called from the Pool if there is no object available to recycle.
      AlignmentList.Alignment nextAlignment()
      Increments the list by one and returns the new AlignmentList.Alignment from this AlignmentList.
      static AlignmentList obtainList() 
      void removeLast()
      Removes the last element of this list of alignments.
      int size()
      guarantees complexity O(1) by definition

      • Methods inherited from class at.jku.risc.stout.urau.util.TinyList

        getLast, isEmpty, toString

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, wait, wait, wait

        Description copied from interface: Poolable

      • nextAlignment

        public AlignmentList.Alignment nextAlignment()
        Increments the list by one and returns the new AlignmentList.Alignment from this AlignmentList.
        Returns:
        An AlignmentList.Alignment, which can be filled with AlignmentList.Alignment.AlignmentAtoms

        public static AlignmentList obtainList()
